introSection: Screw Coaster (Japanese: スクリューコースター) was a steel roller coaster previously located at Nara Dreamland in Nara, Nara, Japan.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Light blue track with white rails and white supports.

fullText:
Screw Coaster (Japanese: スクリューコースター) was a steel roller coaster previously located at Nara Dreamland in Nara, Nara, Japan.



Light blue track with white rails and white supports.
